data.title: Bingham Healthcare increases grant success with Euna Grants, securing $700,000/year, growing to 16+ applications/year.
data.description: In Atlanta and Toronto, Euna Solutions®, a prominent provider of specialized cloud solutions for the public sector, is marking the achievement of Bingham Healthcare in southeastern Idaho. By utilizing Euna Grants, a cloud platform, Bingham Healthcare, a nonprofit health system, has significantly enhanced its grant capabilities. The organization has escalated its active grant applications from five to over sixteen yearly. Consequently, they now consistently secure individual awards annually.

data.title: dotFM reveals FM Top 100 Hits of 2025, showcasing influential podcast platforms and digital brands. 14th edition, data-driven.
data.description: In San Francisco, dotFM, a prominent global media and interactive domain authority under BRS Media, has released its highly anticipated annual report - the FM Top 100 Hits of 2025. This ranking showcases the top podcast platforms, audio services, broadcasters, and emerging digital brands that have shaped audio consumption and online interaction throughout the year. The 14th edition of the FM Top 100 Hits chart goes beyond a traditional ranking, providing insights based on data analysis. This comprehensive list reflects the most influential players in the industry from January to December 2025.

data.title: ZCG Consulting Real Estate restructures large-scale industrial lease portfolio for private equity firm, reducing long-dated exposure.
data.description: ZCG Consulting, a business consulting services platform of Z Capital Group, successfully renegotiated and restructured a large-scale industrial lease portfolio for a sponsor-held private equity firm. This action aimed to decrease long-dated lease exposure while ensuring continuous operations at various facilities. The mandate covered a legacy lease portfolio, resulting in improved financial outcomes for the private equity firm.

data.title: President Brent Consedine of Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties ranked 192 on 2026 Swanepoel Power 200 list.
data.description: In San Diego, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties is pleased to share that their President, Brent Consedine, has been included in the 2026 Swanepoel Power 200 (SP200) list. Consedine secured the No. 192 spot, showcasing his influence within the residential real estate sector. The SP200 ranking is renowned for identifying the most impactful leaders in the industry, highlighting individuals who drive strategy, operations, and overall culture. This recognition solidifies Consedine's position among the influential figures shaping the real estate landscape.

data.title: Moglix launches AI OS for B2B, commits $5 million to AI products; Cognilix streamlines procurement.
data.description: In NOIDA, India, on January 27, 2026, Moglix introduced Cognilix, an AI-operated Operating System catering to B2B procurement. The system aims to streamline enterprise purchasing processes, inventory management, supplier interactions, and sales strategies. data.title: Violet Foods acquires Muir Glen brand from General Mills. Financial terms undisclosed. Expands portfolio which includes Don Pepino.
data.description: In Williamstown, New Jersey, Violet Foods LLC, known for its tomato products, has recently acquired the organic tomato brand Muir Glen from General Mills, Inc. (NYSE: GIS). The financial details of this deal have not been disclosed. This acquisition signals a notable growth for Violet Foods, adding to its existing brands like Sclafani, Fattoria Fresca, and Don Pepino. Noteworthy is that Don Pepino is the leading pizza sauce brand in the Northeast region.

data.title: Children’s Hospital Association & Vizient renew agreement, providing expanded support & services to members.
data.description: Irving, Texas and Washington - Members of the Children’s Hospital Association can expect to receive ongoing core and aggregation support, along with access to a more extensive range of innovative services.

data.title: NETSCOUT boosts observability capabilities, targets remote site management & SSL/TLS risks. nGeniusONE supports Ethernet or Wi-Fi 7 DPI.
data.description: NETSCOUT® SYSTEMS, INC., a major player in observability, AIOps, cybersecurity, and DDoS attack protection solutions, headquartered in Westford, Mass., introduced upgraded features to its observability solutions. These enhancements, announced today, aim to tackle challenges related to remote site management and risks associated with expired SSL/TLS certificates. The latest capabilities added to the nGeniusONE® solution offer real-time deep packet inspection (DPI) through Ethernet or Wi-Fi 7 channels, providing improved visibility and resolving issues effectively. NETSCOUT® is listed on the NASDAQ under the symbol NTCT.

data.title: UPS reported 4Q 2025 revenues of $24.5 billion with operating profit of $2.6 billion. EPS was $2.10, non-GAAP EPS $2.38.
data.description: UPS reported a fourth-quarter revenue of $24.5 billion, with a consolidated operating profit of $2.6 billion and a non-GAAP adjusted consolidated operating profit of $2.9 billion. Diluted earnings per share were $2.10, while non-GAAP adjusted diluted earnings per share were $2.38. The GAAP results for the quarter included total charges of $238 million, or $0.28 per diluted share, of which $238 million was a non-cash, after-tax charge.

data.title: ICSID Tribunal formed to hear Humans Mobile's investment protection claims against Uzbekistan. Singapore-based Humans Mobile Ltd, part of the international holding company Humans Group, is seeking resolution for its business disputes in Uzbekistan through the World Bank's International Centre for Settlement of Investment Disputes.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, in Singapore, Humans Mobile Ltd, a subsidiary of Humans Group, a global holding company with business interests in Uzbekistan, has verified its contentions against the Republic of Uzbekistan at the World Bank's International Centre.

data.title: Tonies reveals new Lightning Yellow Toniebox 2 inspired by Pikachu in collaboration with The Pokémon Company International, available globally in summer 2026 with four Pokémon Tonies.
data.description: A special edition lightning yellow Toniebox 2, inspired by Pikachu and created in collaboration with The Pokémon Company International, has been introduced. This unique Toniebox, along with four Pokémon-themed Tonies, is set to be released worldwide in the summer of 2026. The launch marks a celebration of the partnership between the companies, bringing excitement and joy to fans globally.

data.title: 24X Bermuda Limited reported a record daily FX NDF trade volume of $9 billion on January 26, 2026.
data.description: A new daily trading volume record was achieved on January 26 in HAMILTON, Bermuda. 24X Bermuda Limited ("24X") confirmed setting this milestone by processing a remarkable $9 billion in FX NDF trades for its global institutional clients.

data.title: EOS beauty brand partners with Netflix host Mikey Day for a Big Game commercial, selling limited-edition Cashmere Cakes on Gopuff.
data.description: A popular beauty brand catering to the Gen Z demographic, renowned for their irresistible scents that leave users smelling delectable, recently launched a high-profile ad during a major sporting event featuring Mikey Day from "Is It Cake?" on Netflix. Alongside this marketing push, they released a special line of Cashmere Cakes exclusively available on Gopuff, and also unveiled a new collection of cozy merchandise. The brand's activities made waves in the industry on January 27, 2026, garnering significant attention.
